MEFileInfo  sidecarFileName Instance PropertysidecarFileNamemacOS 26.0+var sidecarFileName: String? { get set }DiscussionThe sidecar filename used by the MediaExtension.

# sidecarFileName | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ MediaExtension ](/documentation/mediaextension)

- [ MEFileInfo ](/documentation/mediaextension/mefileinfo)

- [ sidecarFileName ](/documentation/mediaextension/mefileinfo/sidecarfilename)

- [ MEFileInfo ](/documentation/mediaextension/mefileinfo)

-  sidecarFileName 

Instance Property# sidecarFileName

macOS 26.0+

```
var sidecarFileName: String? { get set }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/mediaextension/mefileinfo/sidecarfilename#discussion)

The sidecar filename used by the MediaExtension.

Represents a new or existing sidecar file located in the same directory as the primary media file. The filename should include the file extension, and should not contain the file path, or contain any slashes. The file extension should be supported by the format reader, and present in the EXAppExtensionAttributes and UTExportedTypeDeclarations dictionaries in the MediaExtension format reader Info.plist.
